creator: champlin@stupidog.org
text:
The recent update to Jabberd 2.2.17 fails to build when it tries to apply
patch-41884d9919 and patch-cve-2012-3525 because they are now included in
the upstream source.  Please see:

  <https://github.com/jabberd2/jabberd2/commit/41884d9919f3b00e44809207ec4f8e7658f606a7>
  <https://github.com/jabberd2/jabberd2/commit/aabcffae560d5fd00cd1d2ffce5d760353cf0a4d>

Fix: 

Remove the now redundant patch files:

   net-im/jabberd2/files/patch-41884d9919
   net-im/jabberd2/files/patch-cve-2012-3525

Thanks much.  -virgil
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to install or upgrade to the current net-im/jabberd
